---
title: "create_full_dbi"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/ti/src/branch/main/R/utils-misc.R#L513)

# `create_full_dbi()`

Title

## Usage

```r
create_full_dbi(x)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `x` | ti object |

## Value

DBI object
